text:
NAME: PRVDR_NUM 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
30 (prior to the 2023 file, the length was 12) 
FILE(S): 
APR Identifiers 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
Alphanumeric character string (e.g.,51275987, 9999999999, 0000000012) 
COMMENT: 
The provider number type code (PRVDR_NUM_SYS) indicates the type of number used to populate 
this field, which is assigned by the issuing entity (PRVDR_NUM_ISSG_ENT_ID). 
If the Provider Number System/Nomenclature (variable called PRVDR_NUM_SYS)= 7 (Social
